mapper.select: SELECT r.res_no, r.res_status, r.user_id AS res_user_id, r.product_no, p.product_name, r.res_date, r.res_time, r.res_content, r.use_date, r.use_time, p.deposit, m.tel, r.pay_date FROM company c JOIN product p ON c.company_no = p.company_no JOIN reservation r ON p.product_no = r.product_no LEFT JOIN member m ON m.user_id = r.user_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.res_date DESC, r.res_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(RES_NO) AS new_res_cnt FROM company c JOIN product p ON c.company_no = p.company_no JOIN reservation r ON p.product_no = r.product_no LEFT JOIN member m ON m.user_id = r.user_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND r.res_status = 'WAIT'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation(user_id, product_no, company_no, res_date, res_time, res_status, res_content, use_date, use_time, pay_date, pay_no) VALUES(#{userId}, #{productNo}, #{companyNo}, NOW(), NOW(), 'WAIT', #{resContent}, #{useDate}, #{useTime}, NULL, NULL)
mapper.select: SELECT r.res_no, r.user_id, m.tel, r.product_no, r.company_no, c.com_name, r.res_date, r.res_time, r.res_status, r.res_content, r.use_date, r.use_time, r.pay_date, r.pay_no, p.product_name, p.product_details, p.original_price, p.is_active, p.img_url, p.pro_type, p.tag, p.deposit, pr.amount, pr.pay_status, pr.refund, pr.refund_date FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN product p ON p.product_no = r.product_no LEFT JOIN payment_reservation pr ON r.res_no = pr.res_no INNER JOIN company c ON c.company_no = r.company_no INNER JOIN member m ON m.user_id = r.user_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT res_no FROM reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId}

if.foreach: UPDATE reservation SET res_status = IF(pay_no IS NOT NULL, 'DONE', 'CANCEL') WHERE res_no = #{resNo} AND NOW() > STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(use_date, ' ', use_time), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')

mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET res_status = 'CANCEL' WHERE res_status = 'WAIT' AND res_date IS NOT NULL AND res_time IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, ADDTIME(res_date, res_time), NOW()) >= 30 AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO payment_reservation(pay_no, user_id, amount, pay_status, pay_date, res_no, refund, refund_date, imp_uid, merchant_uid) VALUES(null, #{userId}, #{amount}, 'SUCCESS', NOW(), #{resNo}, 0, null, #{impUid}, #{merchantUid})
SELECT pay_date AS payDate, pay_no AS payNo FROM payment_reservation WHERE pay_no = LAST_INSERT_ID()
